description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a low-pitched, overhanging roof and a prominent front porch supported by columns. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, complemented by darker trim and a wooden roof. A paved driveway leads to a carport or garage area adjacent to the main building, and a white picket fence encloses the property. Mature landscaping, including a large tree, adds greenery and shade to the side of the house. The windows are arranged in a regular pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior, and the overall design is compact and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a low-pitched roof, front porch, white fencing, and a paved driveway, surrounded by landscaping and a large tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, main entrance, and white picket fence with a driveway extending to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport/garage area, the large tree, and the length of the fence along the property.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back of the bungalow, the driveway, and the full extent of the fencing.
description_view_3: Top-down rear view showing the roof, porch, and the layout of the driveway and fence.
